payload.description: Offset bus lane at right curb allowing buses to move quickly while preserving parking; operates as travel lane in AM and PM peak periods, parking at other times

records.raw_text: Parking in midday, nights, and weekends; Travel Lane in AM and PM peak periods Dedicated Bus Lane & Right Turn Lane: Offset bus lane allows buses to move quickly and preserves parking. Bus Lane is at right curb on Nostrand & Rogers between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd, and on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves.

records.display_name: Curbside Bus/Right Turn Lanes at Nostrand/Flatbush Junction

payload.description: Curbside bus and right-turn lanes for peak periods on approach to Flatbush Ave, with left turn bans to reduce intersection conflicts

records.raw_text: Curbside bus/right turn lanes for peak periods provide extra capacity on approach to Flatbush Ave. Left turn bans reduce conflicts in the intersection. Traffic flow and safety are improved.

records.display_name: Metered Parking and Muni-Meters

records.raw_text: Add meters in commercial areas where there are parking time limits but no meters, or no limits at all. All single space meters will be replaced by Muni-Meters.

records.raw_text: Commercial loading zones keep curb clear for store deliveries. With trucks using curb instead of double-parking, travel lanes are kept open. Delivery 'Windows' on Alternating Curbs, 10 AM to Noon on East Curb, Noon to 2 PM on West Curb.
